name: Adult Diapers
description:
Looking for donations of Adult Diapers (Size XL), preferably the pull-up/pants type, for an elderly lady whom we are supporting in the community.

She has mobility difficulties and relies on a walking stick to move around safely. She is also experiencing incontinence, and because she is quite frail, she is often unable to get to the toilet in time, especially when she is outside her home. Pull-up style diapers would help her feel more comfortable, maintain her dignity, and give her greater confidence to attend medical appointments and carry on with her daily activities.

If you have any Adult Diapers (Size XL, pull-up/pants type) to spare, your donation would make a meaningful difference in supporting her daily needs.

If you are able to help or would like more information, please feel free to reach out to Nisah at 9657 3159 via WhatsApp or phone call.

Thank you for your kindness and generosity in supporting our community.

name: Sofa/Chairs
description: 69-year-old man who lives alone in a 1-room HDB public rental flat and faces significant health, financial and social challenges. He is single, never married, with no children and no siblings. He is currently unemployed, has no regular income and experiences multiple medical conditions, diabetes, hypertension and depression. He spends most of his time at home due to his declining health and spends most of his time sitting on his sofa that has been infested with bedbugs. Donation of a sofa/comfortable chairs will greatly support client in addressing concerns with bed bugs at home. Interested donors, please contact social worker Latricia at 83187180 or email at latriciatay@carecorner.org.sg. Thank you so much for your support.

name: Bed and Mattress

He is single, never married, with no children and no siblings. He is currently unemployed, has no regular income and experiences multiple medical conditions, diabetes, hypertension and depression. He spends most of his time at home due to his declining health and sleeps on an old, thin, worn and torn mattress that is infested with bed bugs. Client is troubled by bedbug bites and is unable to sleep as a result. Donation of a new mattress will greatly support client in addressing concerns with bed bugs at home. Interested donors, please contact social worker Latricia at 83187180 or email at latriciatay@carecorner.org.sg. Thank you so much for your support.

name: Single bed frame
description: Client is a 72 year old Malay elderly who has recently moved into a rental flat with barely any furniture for her to live comfortably with. Having a Single bed frame will ensure that client is able to remain safe in the community/her home. Client ambulates with her motorised scooter in the community and quad stick /walking frame at home. She also has multiple health conditions such as hypertension, hyperlipidaemia, diabetes, and was previously diagnosed with cervical cancer. Client's legs are also weak, and she is unable to walk much in her home, requiring more rests. Having such household item will help her with settling into the rental flat sooner given her health and mobility issues.

name: Shoe Rack
description:
Donor Request: Shoe Rack
A family of four living in a rental 2-room flat in Yishun is in need of a new or used shoe rack.
The household comprises a husband (58), his wife (54), and their two adult sons (aged 22 and 20), who are currently serving National Service. As the family does not own a shoe rack, their footwear tends to pile up outside the flat entrance, creating a cluttered and disorganised space.
This is a particular concern for the wife, who is a stroke survivor and relies on a wheelchair and walker to get around. Clutter near the entrance poses a real safety risk for her when entering and leaving the home, and having a shoe rack would go a long way in keeping the area clear and safe.
The husband is the family's sole breadwinner, working as a private hire vehicle driver. As his income can be variable, and with his wife unable to work due to her condition, the family has limited means to purchase household items on their own.
A donated shoe rack, whether new or used, would make a meaningful difference in supporting a safer and more comfortable home environment for this family. Your generosity would be deeply appreciated.
Required dimensions: Height up to 1m, width up to 1.5m, depth up to 0.3m
specifications: Height up to 1m, width up to 1.5m, depth up to 0.3m

name: Wheelchair
description:
We are seeking a wheelchair for an elderly client with multiple chronic medical conditions who recently underwent left knee surgery. She also experiences daily leg cramps, has reduced bone strength, and underlying heart conditions, making it difficult for her to walk long distances safely.

A donated wheelchair will enable her to attend medical appointments and move around the community more safely. Any donation would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for your kindness and support.
